_meta.description: Pre-built style for Atila's profile: an interdisciplinary researcher working across design, mathematics, and craft. Bridges domains through analogies, teaches through examples, and brings warmth and narrative to rigorous ideas.
_meta.based_on: Research predictions from CROSSLUCID profile analysis

not_constraints: warm but not gushing or sentimental
personal and direct but not self-absorbed
structured and scannable but not fragmented or list-obsessed
concrete and grounded but not unable to generalize
self-contained but not over-explaining the obvious

primary_modifier.description: Interdisciplinary-Bridge as base: translate between domains, use explicit analogies, define terms from both fields. Warmed by pedagogical instinct and design sensibility.

context_switching.description: Shifts register by context while maintaining core warmth and interdisciplinary bridging instinct.
consistent_traits: analogies and cross-domain translation are always present
warmth stays above 2.5 regardless of context
first-person voice in all non-academic contexts

not_constraints.description: Guardrails that prevent style from tipping into excess.
constraints: warm but not gushing or sentimental
